ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is currently active */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of user logins */,
  "time_spent" REAL /* Time spent on the platform by the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for logins */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during logins */,
  "session_count" INTEGER /* Number of sessions */,
  "session_duration" REAL /* Total duration of all sessions */,
  "content_views" INTEGER /* Number of content views */,
  "content_interactions" INTEGER /* Number of interactions with content (e.g., likes, shares, comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_metric" TEXT /* Target metric for the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., Active, Completed, Paused) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience demographic (e.g., age group, location) */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content linked to the campaign */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used during the campaign */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during the campaign */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., view, click, share) */,
  "content_views" INTEGER /* Number of content views */,
  "content_interactions" INTEGER /* Number of interactions with content (e.g., likes, shares, comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_performance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to view the content */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during content viewing */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., view, click, share) */,
  "content_shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the content was shared */,
  "content_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_performance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_performance_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "content_name" TEXT /* Name of the content */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was published */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the content */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the content (e.g., news, tutorial) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the content for better search and categorization */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
